description:
Adventures on INSTAGRAM ▷ http://www.instagram.com/photoallison
My website ▷ http://www.allisonanderson.com

Business inquiries: allison@allisonanderson.com

Huge thank you to Seabourn for hosting me on the adventure of a lifetime. Check out their Antarctica voyages here: https://www.seabourn.com/en_US/cruise-destinations/south-america-antarctica.html

Thank you to the onboard media team, Coulson & Tennant, for capturing my Antarctic experience from the sky! All aerial footage was filmed by them. https://wearectproductions.com/
https://www.instagram.com/coulsontennant
